title: Pyrex Prepware 6001075 Measuring Cup, Red Graphics, Clear
description:
About this item
These sturdy glass measuring cups feature bold read from above measurements (metric and standard).
reviews_5s:
Only about 1$ more than the store, delivered safely. Pyrex brand so it's functional, perfect size, design and pourability.

Weight and build quality is there. Definitely recommend, 6 months going strong.Great, nice and sturdy, made of glass.I like this Pyrex Measuring Cup for several reasons. First, it is made of glass so you can see inside it. Second, the red measuring graphics are easy to read. Third, it is thick glass which is less likely to break, although I did manage to finally break my first cup like this. I used it almost daily and it took 18 years to break, so you do the math there for its durability. Fourth, it is a Pyrex. I like the quality of Pryex. It costs a smidge more but it is worth it. Quality item. Fifth, a glass measuring cup should be a necessary item in every kitchen.Love this measuring cup, easy to use and clean up.Nice sturdy measuring cup with useful markings up to 2 cups / 500 mL. I've had this for over a year and the lettering is still intact. It can handle hot liquids with no problem.Ah, the Pyrex Measuring Cup, my kitchen confidant and partner in (culinary) crime. You know you're an adult when you get unreasonably excited about a measuring cup, but this isn't just any measuring cup – it's like the superhero of kitchen gadgets. I half-expect it to leap out of the cupboard in a cape, ready to save the day!

Let's start with its transparency. It's so transparent; it's practically auditioning for a role in a magic show. I mean, you can see right through it! That's a game-changer, especially for those of us who've been traumatized by countless botched recipes because we couldn't tell a half-cup from a quarter-cup. With the Pyrex Measuring Cup, there's no room for confusion. It's like a culinary crystal ball.

And speaking of magic, this thing can handle hot and cold like a champ. I've poured boiling-hot soup into it, and it didn't flinch. I've also used it to measure out icy-cold milk for my cereal, and it didn't crack under the pressure. It's like the Mr. Freeze of measuring cups – unflappable in the face of extreme temperatures.

But here's where it gets really interesting: the Pyrex Measuring Cup is virtually indestructible. I once dropped it from the top shelf of my kitchen cabinet (don't ask how that happened), and it just bounced like it was made of rubber. I'm convinced it's made from the same material as Captain America's shield. I half-expect it to come with a warranty that says, "Guaranteed to survive the apocalypse – and maybe a small asteroid impact."

Cleaning it is a breeze, too. I've accidentally left chocolate sauce, tomato soup, and who-knows-what-else stuck to it for days, and a simple rinse and swipe with a sponge, and voila, it's like new. I'm pretty sure Pyrex cups are immune to the concept of "stains."

Now, let's talk about those easy-to-read measurements. They're like the font of wisdom for my culinary adventures. I can finally tell the difference between a teaspoon and a tablespoon without consulting the Rosetta Stone of recipes.

In conclusion, the Pyrex Measuring Cup isn't just a kitchen tool; it's a kitchen superhero. It's transparent, temperature-resistant, indestructible, and incredibly easy to clean. It's like the Swiss Army Knife of measuring cups, except it doesn't have a corkscrew or a toothpick – but it doesn't need them because it's already mastered the art of making cooking feel like a magic show. If you want to level up your culinary game and have a blast doing it, this cup is your trusty sidekick. Just remember to give it a superhero name when you're not using it – it deserves it!High quality measuring jug. Feels good. Sizes clearly marked.Good heavy weight glass as expected. Love itHeavy glass measuring cup. Great quality.Will recommend to others
reviews_1s: I’ve had this measuring couple less than five months and the measurements have already faded. Notice in the photos how the bottom half Of the cup has faded off. Definitely not worth it. We’ll try to find an embossed measuring cup instead.I’ve had this measuring cup less than five months and the measurements have already faded. And I’m not even using that often. UselessWhat good is the glass cup if the markings come off? None. They don’t even pour very well, they dribble and dripNo matter how fast or how slow I pour, it always dribbles down the side. It renders it pointless to measure any liquid in it because half of it will end up on the counter.After putting it in the top rack of dishwasher approximately 10 times, the measuring lines are fading, thus becoming useless.I never thought I'd give a Pyrex product a bad review - but this 2 cup is a mess. The measurements labeling is difficult to read and it does not pour without liquid going everywhere. Old cups great, this is awfulBought this measuring cup and the 1st wash in dishwasher almost took all the print came off! I have another Pyrex measuring cup I have had for years which is holding strong and states on the label "made in the USA" - this piece of junk did not make it through one cycle in the dishwasher but states on the label "made in China". Don't waste your money or the aggravation of having to return it!The spout does not work as it should. Liquid goes everywhere!I can’t see the lines anymore and I haven’t had it very long. I have a 20 plus year Pyrex that still shows the markings. I am VERY disappointed.Not sold as a "factory second" but pours all over my counter every time. Won't order from Amazon for this ever again.
